enabled.markdownDescription:
Enable this output

Enable or disable this output. (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: true)

nameField.markdownDescription:
Name of the TenXSummary field identifying the metric

Defines the name of the TenXSummary field whose value identifies a metric counter. Defaults to the [summaryValues](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXSummary+summaryValues) field which holds the value(s) by which TenXObjects are grouped into the current TenXSummary instance. To learn more see [micrometer counters](https://www.baeldung.com/micrometer#2-counter) (Default: [summaryValues](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXSummary+summaryValues))

counterFields.markdownDescription:
Names of the TenXSummary fields used to increment the metric counter value

Defines the name of the TenXSummary field by whose value to increment the counter.

tagFields.markdownDescription:
List of TenXSummary fields to use as metric tag values

Defines the TenXSummary field names to use as `tag` values. Tags are dimensions that enable slicing a particular named metric to drill down to reason about its value. To learn more see [micrometer tags](https://www.baeldung.com/micrometer#1-tags)

tagFieldNames.markdownDescription:
List of custom names to use for TenXSummary fields.

Defines the a list of custom names to give fields when reporting them. Format as a list of name1, custom1, name2, custom2.  For example, to set a custom name of 'My-Custom-Field' to an existing 'intrinsic-field': ``` yaml elastic:   tagFieldNames:     - intrinsic-field     - My-Custom-Field

filter.markdownDescription:
A JavaScript expression an TenXSummary must evaluate as 'truthy' against to be written to this output

Specifies a JavaScript expression that an TenXSummary must evaluate as truthy to write its instance/template field values to the target counter.  For example, to only emit TenXSummaries produced by the 'myMetric' aggregator, specify: ``` yaml elastic:   filter: this.inputName == "myMetric" ```  To learn more see [inputName](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXBaseObject+inputName)

maxCardinality.markdownDescription:
Maximum number of unique metric combinations allowed

Sets the maximum number of unique metric combinations (cardinality) allowed for this output. When exceeded, metrics will be dropped to prevent excessive cardinality. (Accepts number or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: 500)

step.markdownDescription:
The interval at which to publish metrics to output

Sets the interval at which to publish metrics to the time-series destination (e.g., '1m'). To learn more see [rate-aggregation](https://micrometer.io/docs/concepts#rate-aggregation) (Default: 1 minute.)

host.markdownDescription:
Host to send metrics to

Sets the host to send metrics to. (Default: http://localhost:9200)

apiKeyCredentials.markdownDescription:
Base64-encoded credentials string

Sets a base64-encoded credentials string To learn more see: [Elastic credentials](https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/security-api-create-api-key.html)

userName.markdownDescription:
Basic Authentication username

Sets the the Basic Authentication username. If 'elasticApiKeyCredentials' not is set, it will be used instead

password.markdownDescription:
Basic Authentication password

Sets a Basic Authentication password. If 'elasticApiKeyCredentials' is not set it will be used instead

index.markdownDescription:
The index name to write metrics to

Sets the index name to write metrics to. (Default: micrometer-metrics)

autoCreateIndex.markdownDescription:
Whether to create the index automatically if it doesn't exist

Sets whether to create the index automatically if it doesn't exist. (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: true)

pipeline.markdownDescription:
The ingest pipeline name

The ingest pipeline name

indexDateFormat.markdownDescription:
Index date format used for rolling indices

Sets the index date format used for rolling indices. This is appended to the index name, separated by 'elasticIndexDateSeparator'. (Default: yyyy-MM)

timestampFieldName.markdownDescription:
Name of the elastic timestamp field

Sets the name of the elastic timestamp field. (Default: @timestamp)

indexDateSeparator.markdownDescription:
Separator between the index name and the date part

Sets the separator between the index name and the date part (Default: -)
